$comment: Design token file for the Mobile Date Picker - Gap (range connector) component
$description: Component tokens for the Mobile Date Picker Gap - the thin 6px connector rendered between adjacent day cells to visually join a selected date range. When Range=False it is transparent/white filler; when Range=True it carries the in-range fill so consecutive selected days read as one continuous band. Atomic component - nested inside Date Picker Mobile which references it. Figma Reference: Node ID 191-35709

$component.name: Gap
$component.description: A 6px wide, 44px tall connector placed between day cells in the calendar grid. It bridges the horizontal gaps between cells so a selected range appears continuous.
$component.structure: Fixed 6x44px rectangle filling the inter-cell gap, background driven by range membership.

range.false: Not part of a range - transparent/neutral filler
range.true: Inside a selected range - carries the in-range fill

usage.contexts: Date Picker Mobile calendar grid range selection
usage.features: Continuous range band between adjacent day cells

width.description: Mobile date range gap connector width - 6px

height.description: Mobile date range gap connector height - lg - 44px

default.description: Mobile date range gap background when not in range - neutral base - #ffffff

range.description: Mobile date range gap background when in range - primary subtle - #d1e0ff
